title: carlina oligocephala subsp. pallescens
intro: Carlina oligocephala subsp. pallescens is a lesser-known subspecies of the Carlina plant, commonly known as the Carline Thistle. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and prevent infection. Carlina oligocephala subsp. pallescens is typically prepared as a tincture or decoction for medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential health benefits.
